message:
Minor fixes: token display, YAML escaping, gitignore, sitemap refresh

A collection of small fixes and maintenance updates:

## PromptDetailModal.tsx
- Removed "~" (tilde) prefix from token count display
- Before: "~500 tokens"
- After: "500 tokens"
- Rationale: The token count is already an estimate; the tilde was
  redundant and added visual noise

## idea-wizard-SKILL.md
- Added quotes around the description field in YAML frontmatter
- Before: `description: Generate 30 improvement ideas...`
- After: `description: "Generate 30 improvement ideas..."`
- Fixes potential YAML parsing issues with special characters in
  the description (commas, colons, etc.)

## .gitignore
- Added `coverage/` directory to ignore list
- Prevents test coverage reports from being accidentally committed
- Coverage reports are generated by vitest and should remain local

## sitemap.xml
- Regenerated with updated timestamps
- All URLs now reflect the latest build time (2026-01-11T01:22:12.002Z)
- No structural changes to the sitemap; just timestamp updates
- This is a normal artifact of running `bun run build`

Files changed:
- apps/web/src/components/PromptDetailModal.tsx (1 line)
- idea-wizard-SKILL.md (1 line)
- .gitignore (1 line)
- apps/web/public/sitemap.xml (timestamps only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
